mapper.select: SELECT itemid, productid, listprice, unitcost, supplier, status, attr1, attr2, attr3, attr4, attr5, qty FROM item
mapper.update: UPDATE item SET qty = qty - #{quantity} WHERE itemid = #{itemid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item (itemid, productid, listprice, unitcost, supplier, status, attr1, attr2, attr3, attr4, attr5, qty) VALUES (#{itemid}, #{productid}, #{listprice}, #{unitcost}, #{supplier}, #{status}, #{attr1}, #{attr2}, #{attr3}, #{attr4}, #{attr5}, #{qty})
